name: pulsorclip-monorepo
description: PulsorClip is a self-hosted media inspection and export workspace with a Next.js web app, a Telegram bot, and a shared yt-dlp plus ffmpeg core.
author: Adriel Zimbril <hello@adrielzimbril.com> (https://www.adrielzimbril.com/)

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @pulsorclip/core && npm run build --workspace @pulsorclip/web && npm run build --workspace @pulsorclip/bot
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @pulsorclip/web && npm run check --workspace @pulsorclip/bot && npm run check --workspace @pulsorclip/core
